exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your cooking mastery forward
items: Take a cooking skills assessment by attempting to prepare 5 basic techniques: knife cuts, sautéing, boiling, roasting, and seasoning
Research and bookmark 5 reliable cooking resources: 2 beginner-friendly cookbooks, 2 instructional YouTube channels, and 1 cooking technique website
Create a weekly meal planning template and plan your first week of meals focusing on 3-4 basic cooking methods
Set up and organize your pantry with essential ingredients grouped by cooking purpose: proteins, grains, spices, oils, and flavor bases
Practice fundamental knife skills by properly dicing 2 onions, mincing 4 garlic cloves, and julienning 1 carrot using correct hand positioning and cutting techniques
